data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Limits the number of choices presented to users to simplify decision-making.
data.technical_spec: Groups options into categories to reduce cognitive load.

data.title: Fitts' Law
data.description: Designs interfaces that increase the ease and accuracy of selecting interactive elements.
data.technical_spec: Places frequently used buttons and links in easily reachable areas.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Creates visually appealing and intuitive interfaces to enhance user satisfaction.
data.technical_spec: Adopts consistent design guidelines and color schemes.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Presents crucial information at the beginning and end of navigational sequences.
data.technical_spec: Organizes content hierarchically to enhance recall.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Applies Gestalt principles for better visual organization and user comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Uses proximity, similarity, and continuity cues.
